ProfilePro - AI SEO Tool for Google Business Profile SEO
Audit GMB SEO, automate GBP SEO tasks, optimize your GMB everywhere & crush competitors with this AI SEO tool without having to spy!

This extension is like ChatGPT for Google Business Profile (GMB) SEO.

Audit GMB SEO, automate GBP SEO tasks, optimize your GMB everywhere & crush competitors with this AI SEO tool without having to spy!

Revolutionize your Google Business Profile (GBP) SEO with ProfilePro, the state-of-the-art AI Chrome extension by Merchynt. Drawing on our extensive local SEO expertise, gained from assisting over 50,000 businesses, ProfilePro is the ultimate solution for automating and enhancing your Google Business Profile, formerly known as Google My Business (GMB).

Effortlessly Optimize Your Google Business Profile

ProfilePro's AI-driven features streamline your local SEO efforts, saving you time and money on expert SEO consultations and GBP management services. 

With just a few clicks, ProfilePro will:

- Perform automated keyword research tailored for your Google Business Profile
- Recommend an SEO-optimized business description for your business
- Suggest the best business categories for your GBP
- Generate one-click responses to your Google reviews
- Create SEO-optimized Google Business Updates based on your target keywords
- Create AI images to use on your Google Business updates
- Create service & product descriptions optimized for your local SEO keywords
- Answer questions asked on your Google Business Profile
- Much more!

Grow Your Business with ProfilePro

Whether you're a business owner looking to rank higher on Google or a digital marketing agency working on your client's Google profiles, ProfilePro's user-friendly interface is perfect for you. Simply answer three questions, and let our advanced AI optimize your Google Business Profile in no time.

Global Support and Language Compatibility

ProfilePro is tailored to meet the needs of business profiles worldwide and is fully translated into English, Spanish, French, Portuguese, Urdu, Hindi, Tagalog, Dutch, Korean, German, Italian, Arabic, Bengali, Japanese, Punjabi, Norwegian, and Russian.

Get in touch with Merchynt at profilepro@merchynt.com for feature requests or inquiries.

Discover More

Explore Merchynt at www.merchynt.com and learn more about ProfilePro at www.merchynt.com/profilepro.

Want more AI SEO automation for your Google Business Profile? Check out Paige by Merchynt: www.merchynt.com/paige

Privacy and Terms

ProfilePro requires you to log in with the Google account managing or owning your Google Business Profile. We may store your email address for a seamless experience and occasional informational emails, which you can opt out of anytime. By using ProfilePro, you agree to our Privacy Policy (https://www.merchynt.com/privacypolicy) and Terms of Use (https://www.merchynt.com/profileproterms).

*Note: The correct name of this Chrome extension is "ProfilePro" not "Profile Pro" and "Merchynt" not "Merchant"

Text to Speech (TTS) | AI Voice Generator with Realistic Voices – AIVocal
AIVocal: Free AI voice generator & TTS tool, converts text to audio like Elevenlabs, downloads MP3.

Let AIVocal be your most powerful AI voice generator and your closest-to-human-voice text to speech (TTS) assistant, delivering results comparable to ElevenLabs in natural-sounding audio quality.

Use our online AI voice generator and best synthetic voices to convert text to audio that sounds remarkably like a human voice, offering a cost-effective alternative to Minimax Audio with similar high-fidelity performance. Instantly transform your text into natural-sounding speech with our advanced TTS technology and download it as an MP3 audio file.

Features:
✅ Free to Use AI Text to Speech
Text to speech from AIVocal lets you listen to docs, articles, PDFs, email, and other formats — anything you read. It’s one of the fastest growing voice generator extensions in the Chrome store.
✅ 600+Natural AI Voices
600+ realistic voices across 30+ languages for the most human-like listening experience. So you can understand and remember more.
✅ Read Any Text Out Loud
Turn any text, article into clear, natural audio with our AI Voice tool. And let AI read this to me aloud — perfect for multitasking, learning, or hands-free listening.
✅ Listen on desktop or mobile devices.
Anything you’ve saved to your voice library instantly syncs across devices so that you can listen to anything, anywhere, anytime. Saved artifacts are synced to the cloud and accessible across all your devices. 
✅ Download to MP3
We help you download the audio files you create locally in MP3 format.

User Cases
1️⃣ Students & Learners – Convert notes, textbooks, or research papers into audio for faster comprehension and multitasking.
2️⃣ Professionals – Lawyers, doctors, or business users can listen to reports, contracts, and lengthy documents hands-free.
3️⃣ Accessibility Support – Designed for users with dyslexia, vision impairments, or reading difficulties.
4️⃣ Content Lovers – Turn blogs, ebooks, and articles into podcasts you can enjoy while commuting, exercising, or relaxing.

FAQs
➤  Is AIVocal free to use?
A1: Yes, AIVocal offers a free version with standard voices. Premium plans unlock unlimited access to high-quality AI voices.
➤ Can I download the audio for offline listening?
A2: Absolutely! You can export your TTS audio as MP3 files and listen without internet access.
➤ What file types does AIVocal support?
A3: You can use AIVocal with Google Docs, PDFs, emails, web pages, and even image-based text via OCR.
➤ Does AIVocal work across devices?
A4: Yes. Your saved files sync to the cloud, so you can seamlessly switch between desktop and mobile devices.
➤ What makes AIVocal different from other TTS tools?
A: AIVocal combines realistic AI voices, image-to-speech conversion, cross-device sync, and MP3 export, making it an all-in-one productivity and accessibility tool.

AIVocal is a completely free, lightweight, and easy-to-use embedded AI voice generator tool, providing a budget-friendly substitute for premium options like ElevenLabs or Minimax Audio. Use it now to experience the best AI-driven text to speech generator and effortlessly convert text to audio!

Or email us at aivocalio@gmail.com

This extension allows you to download  captions data from Youtube. You can download captions data in multiple file formats.

Youtubeの字幕ファイルをダウンロードすることができます。
字幕をダウンロードしたい動画ページでYoutube Subtitle Download Helperのアイコンをクリックすると、取得可能な言語・ファイル形式を選択してダウンロードすることができます。
TEXT, CSV, SRT, VTT, LRCのファイル形式をサポートしています。
この拡張機能は広告の表示・ユーザのデータの取得・送信を一切しません。
動画に字幕が存在するのにもかかわらず拡張機能が正常に動作しない場合、adblockを無効にしてみてください。

This extension allows you to download  captions data from Youtube.
Click the YouTube Subtitle Download Helper icon on the video page where you want to download subtitles. 
You can select and download available languages and file formats.
Supported file formats are .srt, .vtt, .csv, .txt, .lrc.
This extension doesn't show ads and send user's data anywhere.
If subtitles are present in your video but the extension doesn't work properly, try disabling adblock.
This extension is open source software.
You can see the source code here.
https://github.com/kyamashiro/youtube-subtitle-download-helper

change note:
v2.0.0 - Resolved the problem of subtitle retrieval failure. Introduced an in-screen download button. Users can now configure the default subtitle retrieval language and file format.
v1.1.0 - Fix problem that prevented download.
v1.0.6 - Fixed the problem of download failures due to same origin errors.
v1.0.5 - Support LRC file format.
Extract NotebookLM mindmaps with corrected X-coordinate level detection and connection-based parent-child mapping

Export Mindmaps from NotebookLM with One Click

NotebookLM Mindmap Extractor is a Chrome extension that allows users to export mindmaps created in Google NotebookLM into portable formats such as FreeMind (.mm), OPML, and structured XML. It helps researchers, students, professionals, and content creators preserve and share mindmaps outside the NotebookLM environment.

Key Benefits

Offline Access & Portability: Export mindmaps and use them with popular tools like FreeMind, Freeplane, and other compatible editors.

Multiple Export Formats: Choose from FreeMind (.mm), OPML, and structured XML formats.

High Accuracy: Maintains the original structure of your mindmap, including parent-child relationships and text content.

No Internet Required: All processing is done locally in your browser—your data never leaves your device.

Features

Smart Node Detection: Extracts nodes accurately from NotebookLM’s SVG-based interface.

Hierarchical Mapping: Identifies root nodes and builds structured trees using path and position analysis.

Noise Filtering: Removes interface elements and irrelevant data during export.

Visual Preview: See the structure of your mindmap before exporting.

Automatic File Naming: Generates clean, descriptive filenames using node content and timestamps.

How It Works

Open any NotebookLM page with a mindmap.

Click the extension icon and start detection.

Preview the structure, choose a format, and export.

Who It's For

Researchers & Students: Preserve study notes and literature reviews for offline use.

Project Managers: Export planning mindmaps for team collaboration.

Writers & Educators: Save outlines and structures for integration with writing or learning platforms.

Privacy & Security

All data is processed locally in your browser.

The extension does not collect or transmit any user data.

Requires minimal permissions.

Get Started

Install the extension, open a mindmap in NotebookLM, and export in just a few clicks. No setup required.

Transform any ordinary screen-recording into a studio-style video and a step-by-step how-to article with screenshots.

Clueso turns raw screen recordings into stunning, studio-quality videos and step-by-step documentation – in minutes. No editing or design expertise needed.

With Clueso, anyone can create stunning product videos and documentation for their product quickly.

How Clueso works:

Just record or upload a raw screen recording and let Clueso handle the rest. Here’s the magic it does for you:

🗣️ AI-generated Script & Voiceovers: Clueso transcribes your audio, polishes it into a clean script, and then lets you make quick edits. It then generates studio-quality voiceovers, perfectly synced to your video.

🔍 Auto-Zoom & Smart Effects: Clueso automatically highlights key areas of your UI with zoom-in effects. You can also add spotlights, callouts, and other animations in a single click.

📽️ Combine Clips Easily: Easily combine clips, add chapters, insert summary slides, external footage, or even AI-generated video segments.

🎨 Branded Templates: Create and save branded intros, outros, backgrounds, thumbnails, and transitions to use across all your videos.

🌏 Translations: Translate your videos into 40+ languages. Use our glossary to fine-tune terms and ensure translation accuracy.

📃 Step-by-step documentation: Clueso automatically creates detailed step-by-step articles with embedded screenshots and GIFs from any video. Use our AI agent to get the tone and formatting you want.

Who’s Clueso for?

- Founders & Product Teams: Create product demo videos for customers or internal stakeholders.
- Product Marketing Teams: Launch new features with polished videos and GIFs.
- Customer Education, Success & Support Teams: Build onboarding flows, how-to guides, training videos, and help articles.
- Sales Enablement, L&D & IT Teams: Produce internal training videos and SOPs for tools, workflows, and processes.

And anyone else who wants to create engaging videos and documentation fast.

Crop It! Provide users crop current web page's screenshot feature. Users could use it to capture images they need.

Use 「Crop It!」 to crop the exactly screenshot you need. Users could choose to save the screenshot into a file or clipboard. 

- Here comes several ways to turn on 「Crop It!」.
1. Turn on contextMenu & choose 「Crop It!」.
2. Use keyboard shortcut > 「Cmd (Ctrl) + . 」.

- Usage instructions:
1. Turn on 「Crop It!」.
2. Adjust the selection size & position you need. (Users could press keyboard 「Esc」or click overlay to turn off 「Crop It!」)
3. Right-click on selection, there will be many aspect-ratio to choose.
4. Double click the selection or press keyboard 「Enter」 to save screenshot into a  image file. Or press 「Cmd (Ctrl) + c」to save screenshot into clipboard.

Otherwise, users could always use options to set overlay's color or opacity they like.

Die Erweiterung „orfline - ORF Downloader“ integriert sich nahtlos mit ORF TVthek und fügt einen Button hinzu um Videos zu speichern

Die Browser-Erweiterung „orfline - ORF Download“ bietet eine bequeme Möglichkeit, Videos aus der ORF TVthek herunterzuladen. Die Erweiterung integriert sich nahtlos in den Browser und fügt einen Download-Button auf der Video-Seite der ORF TVthek hinzu. Dadurch können ganze Sendungen sowie einzelne Teilabschnitte ganz einfach in voller Qualität gespeichert werden.

Alternativ können Inhalte auch über die Website orfline.at heruntergeladen werden. Dazu einfach den ORF TVthek-Link auf der Website einfügen. 

Die Nutzung von Browser-Erweiterungen zum Herunterladen von Inhalten unterliegt möglicherweise verschiedenen rechtlichen Bestimmungen in Abhängigkeit vom Standort und den geltenden Urheberrechtsvorschriften. Es liegt in der Verantwortung des Benutzers sicherzustellen, dass er über die erforderlichen Rechte verfügt, um die heruntergeladenen Inhalte zu nutzen, und die geltenden Urheberrechtsbestimmungen seines Landes zu beachten. Wir übernehmen keine Verantwortung für Verletzungen von Urheberrechten oder anderen Gesetzen, die durch die Nutzung von Browser-Erweiterungen wie „orfline - ORF Download“ entstehen könnten. Die Verwendung solcher Erweiterungen erfolgt auf eigenes Risiko. Wir empfehlen den Benutzern, die rechtlichen Rahmenbedingungen und Nutzungsbedingungen der jeweiligen Plattformen sorgfältig zu prüfen, bevor sie solche Erweiterungen nutzen.

Do you want to download your favorite podcasts on Google Podcasts but don't know how? Well, this extension can help you with this task. It simply creates a button that allows you to download the podcast which is currently selected for playback.
